text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One evening, I find Symboli Rudolf gazing out onto the track with a
deeply moved expression on her face.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Ah, it's you. Good timing. Do you have a moment?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Don't worry, it's nothing serious. I wanted to share this view with you,
that's all.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Do you see Narita Brian over there? She's in the student council with
me.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
The other day, she told me she'd dethrone me—that no crown is so
secure that it can't be knocked off one's head.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
It's as she says. With each passing day, she grows stronger and faster.
She runs doggedly toward her prize, never looking back.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Each student in this academy invests the entirety of their spirit into
running ever faster toward their goal.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
And seeing that motivates me in turn. As the Tracen Academy student
council president, and as someone who wishes for their happiness.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: There is yet more I must achieve for their sakes.
choice_data_list:
All the more reason you can't afford to be
dethroned right now.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Precisely.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
If I am to stand above my peers and guide them, I must prove myself
worthy of such a position.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
The path before us is clear. However, neither of us can achieve such a
Herculean feat alone. We must work in lockstep—

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text: Eek!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Hm? What was that?!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Look—over there! A pair of students just collapsed! Quickly, follow
me!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Pant... pant... Are you all right?!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text: Huh?! P-President Rudolf?!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Don't force yourself to move. You just took a fall, didn't you? Could
one of you explain what happened?

text_block_list.name: Umamusume B
text_block_list.text: U-um, well, actually...

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text: No, wait! I'm sorry! It's my fault!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Hm?

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
We were just... well, we were tickling each other, and we lost our
balance, that's all...

text_block_list.name: Umamusume B
text_block_list.text:
W-we're sorry! We didn't mean to take up your time! Don't worry
about us, we'll be fine!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: It's fine, I didn't mean to cause any—

text_block_list.name: Umamusume
text_block_list.text: We're so sorryyyyy!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The girls dash off as fast as their legs can carry them.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: ...I suppose I should be glad that neither was hurt.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
That said, I jumped to a hasty conclusion and ended up frightening
those poor girls. I still have much to learn... How embarrassing.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
I do want to close the gap between the other students and myself,
but it's certainly not going to happen anytime soon.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Thank you. I truly appreciate it. I'm looking forward to your guidance
from here on out.
